description: Refactor the CalculatorApp Android project currently open in Android Studio. Rename the class 'CalcEngine' and its corresponding file 'CalcEngine.kt' to 'Calculator'. Within the 'Calculator' class, rename the methods 'doAdd', 'doSub', 'doMul', 'doDiv', and 'doMod' to 'add', 'subtract', 'multiply', 'divide', and 'modulo' respectively. Ensure all references in 'CalcActivity.kt' are updated and the project builds successfully.
